name: Localo
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Localo Does

Localo is a Google Maps rank checker designed for business owners, agencies, and freelancers who want better local rankings without the SEO headache. It tracks rankings, analyzes competitors, and automates local SEO tasks. While it’s feature-rich, it lacks advanced link-building options. Great for hands-off local SEO.

Source: G2

Key Features

  • Tracks keyword performance across locations and shows real-time shifts on a visual Position Map.
  • Uses AI to auto-generate posts, respond to reviews, and publish content across Google and Facebook.
  • Monitor competitors, manage citations, and get hands-on optimization tips tailored to your profile.

Benefits of Localo

  • Boosts visibility with smarter local SEO
  • Saves time by automating tasks
  • Tracks competitors to stay ahead

Pricing

  • Starts at $99/month 
  • Elite plan: $499/month 
  • Scalable for businesses of all sizes

Pros

  • Easy-to-use dashboard
  • Strong automation features
  • Works in every country

Cons

  • Higher pricing for agencies

‍
